title: Vanilla Sprinkles
description: A mod about sprinkling a layer on top of vanilla (includes increased bundle size and dyeable bundles!)
body:
![Vanilla Sprinkles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5883a7845978ba7a7ce60eeeb3df78640cb96c52.png)

## Description
This mod adds a few vanilla-adjacent features:

- Bundles craftable with leather and without having to enable experimental features
- 4x increased bundle inventory size
- Dyeable bundles (re-dyeing supported)
- Brewing recipes for Potion of Decay and Potion of Luck
- Spawn Eggs for the Giant and the Illusioner added to the Creative menu

In-game documentation is available via the Treatise if [Treatise](https://modrinth.com/mod/treatise) is installed.

## Support
If you have a bug report, feature request, or any other type of issue, please post on our GitHub [issues page](https://github.com/DentedLeft/Dented-Modding/issues).  This is an issues page for all of our mods, so be sure to include the mod's name and version in your post.  We appreciate all feedback!

If you'd like to support development, you can leave a tip at our [BuyMeACoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/dentedleft).  Only if it's within your means- otherwise, using, sharing, and enjoying the mod is support enough.  Thank you!
